content:
## Dataset summary
- **Rows:** 100
- **Columns:** 19

## Column profiles
pl_name | VARCHAR | 100/100 | 100 unique planet names
hostname | VARCHAR | 100/100 | 72 unique host stars. Top: Kepler-1 (2), 55 Cnc (4), ups And (3), HR 8799 (4), GJ 876 (3)
discoverymethod | VARCHAR | 100/100 | Transit: 68, Radial Velocity: 18, Imaging: 7, Pulsar Timing: 3, Microlensing: 2
disc_year | BIGINT | 100/100 | min=1992, max=2024, mean=2015.3, median=2017
disc_facility | VARCHAR | 100/100 | Kepler: 58, TESS: 10, Keck: 8, Haute-Provence: 3, Lick: 4, others: 17
pl_orbper | DOUBLE | 100/100 | min=0.73, max=320000.0, mean=4521.2, median=3.42 (log-scale: spans 6 orders of magnitude)
pl_orbsmax | DOUBLE | 100/100 | min=0.015, max=115.0, mean=3.81, median=0.046
pl_orbeccen | DOUBLE | 72/100 | min=0.0, max=0.934, mean=0.069, median=0.025 (28% NULL)
pl_rade | DOUBLE | 93/100 | min=0.85, max=15.0, mean=4.82, median=2.15 (7% NULL)
pl_bmasse | DOUBLE | 80/100 | min=0.02, max=5950.0, mean=352.8, median=10.5 (20% NULL)
pl_eqt | DOUBLE | 84/100 | min=600, max=2650, mean=1384.2, median=1250
pl_insol | DOUBLE | 78/100 | min=120, max=8500, mean=2341.5, median=1700
st_teff | DOUBLE | 94/100 | min=3129, max=7430, mean=5654.2, median=5700
st_rad | DOUBLE | 94/100 | min=0.08, max=1.84, mean=0.99, median=0.97
st_mass | DOUBLE | 94/100 | min=0.32, max=1.92, mean=0.97, median=0.95
st_spectype | VARCHAR | 88/100 | G-type: 45, K-type: 22, F-type: 12, M-type: 4, A-type: 3
sy_dist | DOUBLE | 100/100 | min=4.7, max=3300.0, mean=218.5, median=190.1
ra | DOUBLE | 100/100 | min=4.85, max=346.87, mean=240.3
dec | DOUBLE | 100/100 | min=-51.07, max=52.34, mean=28.4

## Notable patterns
- 28% of pl_orbeccen values are NULL — eccentricity analysis will have reduced coverage
- 20% of pl_bmasse values are NULL — mass measurements missing for a significant fraction
- pl_orbper spans 6 orders of magnitude (0.73 to 320,000 days) — log scale essential
- Discovery methods are heavily skewed: Transit (68%) dominates, creating selection effects
- Multi-planet systems present: 55 Cnc (4 planets), HR 8799 (4), ups And (3), GJ 876 (3)
